compiled_state.title: Write failing RED test for plugin boundary migration
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Create tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh. This test must FAIL before Task 3 (migration) and PASS after it. It validates the post-migration state through behavioral assertions.

## TDD
Given: repo in current state (files at old paths, grep gate finds 20+ matches)
When: bash tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
Then: exits non-zero (FAIL) because:
  1. git grep -r "plugins/dso/docs/designs|plugins/dso/docs/findings|plugins/dso/docs/archive" -- "*.md" "*.sh" finds matches (exits 0), but we assert exit 1 (no matches)
  2. test -f plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md → currently fails (doesn't exist)
  3. test -d docs/designs && test -d docs/findings && test -d docs/archive → currently fails
  4. test -x tests/skills/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh → currently fails
  5. bash tests/skills/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh exits 0 → currently fails (file doesn't exist)

After Task 3: all 5 assertions pass (exit 0).

## Implementation
1. Create tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh with the 5 assertions above
2. chmod +x tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
3. Update .test-index: Add RED marker [test_plugin_boundary_migration] for the source file being guarded:
   plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md: tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh [test_plugin_boundary_migration]

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED marker tolerates the failing test)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
- [ ] Script exits non-zero in current state (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for plugin boundary migration
  Verify: grep '\[test_plugin_boundary_migration\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
